product.name: Room Divider, 4 Panel, Folding Privacy Screen, Black, 63 x 67 Inches, Bohemian, Wood, Woven Paper Rope and Bamboo Style, for Decoration, Partition, Privacy, Floor Mount, Solid
product.description: Transform your space instantly with the AONLEE 4-Panel Room Divider, a stylish and functional privacy screen that elegantly defines areas in your home or office. This freestanding folding partition features a solid wood frame with beautiful hand-woven paper rope and bamboo accents, creating a sophisticated look with an arched top design. The woven panels provide privacy while allowing light and air to flow through, maintaining an open feel in your space. Standing 67 inches tall with a 63-inch width when fully extended, this versatile divider can create a dressing area, define a workspace, or separate living zones. The sturdy construction includes metal hinges for smooth folding, and it collapses to just 15.5 inches wide for convenient storage. No assembly required—simply unfold and position as needed. Floor pads protect your surfaces while the black finish complements various interior styles. Perfect for bedrooms, living rooms, and offices where you need flexible space management with a touch of elegance.
features: STYLISH PRIVACY SOLUTION: 4-panel room divider creates instant privacy while maintaining a soft view through woven panels, perfect for defining spaces in open rooms.
ELEGANT DESIGN: Hand-woven paper rope with bamboo accents and arched top adds natural texture and refined style to any living room, bedroom, or office space.
STURDY CONSTRUCTION: Solid wood frame with double-sided woven panels and metal hinges provides stable performance while allowing gentle airflow between divided spaces.
CONVENIENT PORTABILITY: Folds flat for compact storage measuring just 15.5" W x 2.25" D x 67" H, with no assembly required straight from the box.
GENEROUS DIMENSIONS: Standing at 63" L x 0.5" D x 67" H when fully extended, this versatile divider works perfectly in bedrooms, living rooms, and office environments.
